title: Cognee API Usage Examples
description: Representative request/response examples for the Cognee REST API

examples.title: Add a file to a dataset
examples.description: Upload a PDF document to the 'research_papers' dataset
examples.notes: The 'data' field accepts file uploads, HTTP URLs, or GitHub repository URLs

examples.title: Cognify a dataset
examples.description: Transform the 'research_papers' dataset into a knowledge graph

request.custom_prompt: Extract entities focusing on research methodologies, authors, and findings. Identify key relationships between concepts.

examples.title: Semantic graph completion search
examples.description: Ask a natural language question and receive LLM-synthesized answer from the knowledge graph

request.query: What are the main conclusions across the research papers?
request.system_prompt: Answer the question using the provided context. Be as brief as possible.

examples.title: RAG completion search
examples.description: Perform retrieval-augmented generation over the knowledge graph

request.query: Summarize the key methodologies used in the papers

examples.title: Temporal search
examples.description: Search for time-based relationships and events in the graph

examples.title: Agentic completion search
examples.description: Multi-step agentic search with tool use

request.query: Find all entities related to machine learning and their connections

examples.title: Get dataset processing status
examples.description: Check whether the cognify pipeline has completed for a dataset

examples.title: Create an agent identity
examples.description: Create an AI agent identity with its own API key
